subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, the Most Merciful, Who hast manifested from the horizon of forgiveness! Verily, Thy handmaiden Ḍíyá', who was affiliated with Thy servant, hath ascended unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ربی الرحمن المتجلی من افق الغفران قد ارتحلت امتک ضیاء المنتسبه الی عبدک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
